title: BOLSIUS Basic Candles for Decoration dimensione cero singolo: h 7.8 cm Ø5.8cm Bianco
features: EYE-PLEASING UNSCENTED LONG LASTING CANDLES - Create a luxury experience for every occasion with Bolsius White unscented pillar candles. Our pillar candle set enhances the appearance and prevents it from dripping or melting away fast

PERFECT CENTERPIECE CANDLES FOR DECORATIONS - Our wedding candles are perfect for impressing the guests in wedding, parties, spas and home gatherings. The unscented votive candles will also make the ambiance romantic at candlelight dinner. Our White candles pillar feature a classic, smooth sided texture that makes them ideal for adding a whiff of allure to your home, business, or special event.

PREMIUM QUALITY LEAD-FREE DRIPLESS CANDLES - Bolsius unscented candle pack are of highest quality wax, and pure cotton wick, which prevents it from dripping and melting fast and our White pillar candle features cotton wicks which help the clean burning candles to burn clean and smoke-free

17 HOUR LONG BURN TIME - Our dripless pillar candles are 100% unscented. Large size of our clean burning candle makes it ideal for lanterns, centerpieces, and all your candle needs. They are dripless and smokeless, leaving an ambient glow. Enjoy 17 hours of burn time for everyday use and special occasions.

GREAT VALUE PACK - This White unscented candle set comes with 12 plain candles of 80 mm x 58 mm or 2.25 x 3 inches They come packed securely in a sturdy cardboard box. These thick candles fit standard pillar candle holders set.
description: Product Description Basic waxes and/or table waxes; on a beautifully set table, candles are not missing. Classic size with smooth surface and high quality and perfect combustion. Colour: white. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials, do not leave unattended, monitor burn time, and properly dispose of remnants.
